Lydia: Fuck this place reeks of mildew and unwashed urchins. Doesn't your precious Dibella demand basic fucking hygiene, Imperial? Those brats probably stink worse than a Falmer's asscrack after Horker stew. Constance Michel: Those children have suffered enough without you spewing your vulgar nonsense! This war has left them with nothing but this roof over their heads. If you dare insult my orphans again, I'll—
